agent_stats.outcome_reasoning: The document defines the Mill Hill Conservation Area boundary across three area groups. Area Group 0 (North section, page 9) and Area Group 1 (South section, page 10) both achieved strong matches (864 and 480 inliers respectively) with good scale consistency and road agreement at the intersection of The Ridgeway and Hammers Lane. Area Group 2 (Wide view, page 12) was more difficult due to its scale, but the initial candidate provided the best available match (24 inliers). All three groups have been committed to form the final boundary.

iterations.reasoning: The committed candidates for area groups 0, 1, and 2 represent different parts of the Mill Hill Conservation Area. All matches show strong visual correspondence with the underlying OS tile, specifically aligning with the distinct cul-de-sac pattern of 'The Meads' and the main road layout of 'Mill Hill Village' (The Ridgeway). Candidate 0 has a very high n_inliers (864) and strong road name agreement, confirming the spatial accuracy across the multi-page document.
